since_last: 81% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.88%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC +1.08% · Gold -1.12% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 81% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.88%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.88%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +1.14%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: HON is the standout at -50.95%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +21.78%, KLAC +12.21%, AMAT +11.80%, BIDU +9.38%, PANW +9.14%. Laggards: HON -50.95%, SMCI -6.79%, DLR -3.34%, SYNA -2.79%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.69% at $163.48
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.69% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
